author: ec2-user
text: Implemented structural canonical endpoints with strict authority parsing, IPv6 URI/scope handling, nondefault UDP ports, distinct local/peer and transport-owner identity, owner-safe receiver registration, transactional construction, checksum/protocol validation, and idempotent concurrent teardown across in-memory/SCHC/Node/Secure/Packet channels. Added versioned EndpointPolicy with atomic memory/SQLite pin/context migration, cross-handle enforcement, legacy alias reconciliation, scoped TOFU/EDHOC normalization, and definitive SQLite cancellation outcomes. Node lifecycle and packet construction rollback are failure-safe. Validation: latest full CoAP 361 passed; focused final 221 passed; broader endpoint/client/node gate 412 passed before final store-only change; Ruff, scoped mypy, and git diff checks pass. Three independent final reviews found no P0-P2 issues.
